ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Square Error metric for the experiment */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error metric for the experiment */,
  "time_this_iter_s" REAL /* Time taken for the current iteration in seconds */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Indicates if the experiment is completed */,
  "training_iteration" INTEGER /* Training iteration count */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the experiment's log entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the experiment */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the experiment */,
  "last_updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "num_layers" INTEGER /* Number of layers in the model */,
  "num_blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks in the model */,
  "layer_widths" INTEGER /* Width of layers in the model */,
  "input_chunk_length" INTEGER /* Length of input chunks for training */,
  "n_epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for training */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during training */,
  "dropout" REAL /* Dropout rate during training */,
  "output_chunk_length" INTEGER /* Length of output chunks */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used in the training */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate for the optimizer */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used in the training */,
  "activation_function" TEXT /* Activation function used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the host */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the machine where the experiment is run */,
  "node_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the host machine */,
  "cpu_count" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores on the host */,
  "memory_gb" REAL /* Total memory in gigabytes on the host */,
  "gpu_count" INTEGER /* Number of GPUs on the host */,
  "gpu_model" TEXT /* Model of the GPUs on the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hosts_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "time_since_restore" REAL /* Time since the last restoration in seconds */,
  "iterations_since_restore" INTEGER /* Number of iterations since the last restoration */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., INFO, ERROR, DEBUG) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed log message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag used for categorizing the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with access */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the project */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the project */,
  "last_updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the comment creation */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last update to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the publication */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, viewer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the user's account creation */,
  "last_login" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
